title: how to copy to local containerd daemon
body:
how to copy to local containerd daemon, not docker daemon

the follow not work
```
skopeo copy oci:nginx --src-shared-blob-dir ./share docker://localhost:5000/nginx --dest-tls-verify=false

skopeo copy oci:nginx --src-shared-blob-dir ./share docker-daemon:nginx:latest --dest-daemon-host unix:///var/run/containerd/containerd.sock
```

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out. The issue is already tracked in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/237 so I am going to close.

In short: `containerd` is not supported at the moment.
